title: Lava source highlighter
description: A mod which marks lava source blocks that are still and what direction lava is flowing in.
body: Lava source highlighter. is a simple mod that shows where still lava source blocks are and also what direction lava is flowing. This mod is quite simple and is good for draining lava lakes. I made this mod to help technical Minecraft servers that make perimeters and have to drain lava lakes and this mod makes it easier to do!
